description: Right-column business diagram with four colored diagonal bands labeled Recruitment, Real Estate, Matchmaking, and Education. Associated brand names appear to the right: Naukri, iimjobs, Hirist, NaukriGulf, Naukri Fast Forward, JobHai, AmbitionBox, Naukri Campus, DoSelect, Zwayam, 99acres, Jeevansathi, Aisle, and Shiksha. Uses icon-style line drawings within each band.
Small blue line icon of an eye with connected nodes, used as the icon for the Our Vision section.
